other.tut28: Вот там стоит бутылочка антисептика. Прочитайте, для чего она нужна, и возьмите ее, чтобы продолжить.
other.tut29b: Если регулярно дезинфицировать конечность, со временем она заживет. Стрелка рядом со значком показывает, прогрессирует ли инфекция или регрессирует.
other.tut29c: Дезинфицирующие средства не суммируются, поэтому не стоит распылять их много раз подряд. Лучше делать это один раз, регулярно.
other.tut30: Помните, что хорошее питание и физическая форма помогают поддерживать иммунитет. Продолжите движение вправо.
other.tut31: Здесь вам нужно будет присесть. Удерживайте S.
other.tut32: Контейнеры необходимы для хранения вещей. Один из них прямо перед вами!
other.tut33: Перетащите меня в этот мусорный мешок. Я не приму это близко к сердцу.
other.tut34: Теперь один раз нажмите ПКМ по контейнеру, чтобы увидеть его содержимое, и вытащите меня из него.
other.tut35: У вас отлично получается! Помните, вы не можете использовать предметы из панели здоровья, если они находятся в контейнере. Пройдите налево.
other.tut36: Знание — сила! Наведите курсор мыши на элементы и статусы (в левом нижнем углу), чтобы прочитать, что они делают.
other.tut37: ЛКМ заставит вас нанести удар, если вы безоружны/держите предмет, который нельзя использовать в основной руке.
other.tut38: Используйте это для разрушения чего-либо. Старайтесь свести копание к минимуму, это медленный процесс, который быстро утомляет.
other.tut39: Некоторые состояния, такие как боль или истощение, проходят не сразу. Ускорьте время (1-3), чтобы они прошли быстрее.
other.tut41: Вы можете спать, используя кнопку в правом нижнем углу панели здоровья. Не спите на холодном, твердом полу; на резиновом полу гораздо удобнее.
other.tut42: Иногда бывает полезно самостоятельно добывать необходимые вещи.
other.tut42a: Вот нож и куб. Из них вы сделаете гвозди. Сначала положите оба предмета в свой инвентарь.
other.tut42ab: Откройте меню крафта (C), выберите рецепт гвоздей и нажмите на иконку предмета вверху, чтобы создать их.
other.tut42ac: Отлично. В большинстве рецептов требуются предметы с определенными свойствами. Вы можете узнать, какими свойствами обладает тот или иной предмет, посмотрев его подробное описание.
other.tut42ad: Качество жидкости суммируется — это означает, что одна и та же бутылка со 100 мл жидкости будет иметь более высокое качество, чем с 10 мл.
other.tut42b: В любом случае. Нахождение в сложной ситуации может серьезно подорвать ваш моральный дух. Старайтесь сохранять позитивный настрой. Такие вещи, как правильное питание, всегда помогают.
other.tut43: На этом завершается заключительный этап повторного обучения. Пожалуйста, подойдите к желтому устройству в дальнем конце коридора.
other.tut44: Дальнейшие инструкции будут предоставлены после вашего пробуждения. При необходимости обратитесь к странице управления. Удачи!
other.hpimmunitydsc:
Способность организма бороться с инфекциями.
Низкий иммунитет приводит к прогрессированию инфекций даже при дезинфекции.
other.hphealthdsc: Заживление будет происходить гораздо медленнее, если уровень ниже 10.
other.keybindsdsc: Open the keybinds file. Remember to save any changes!
other.custommusicdsc:
Откройте папку с пользовательской музыкой.
Вы можете поместить туда файлы .mp3/.ogg/.wav, чтобы они отображались в качестве вариантов при использовании MP3-плеера.
Другие типы файлов не поддерживаются.

other.alertcontainerstackingalt: Этот контейнер нельзя использовать, так как он сам находится внутри другого контейнера!
other.alerttoounhappy: Нельзя использовать неопиоидные лекарства, когда несчастен

other.unknownobjectwarning: Ты слишком глупенький, чтобы это разобрать. (Требуется <> ур. ИНТ)
other.wantstradetip: Скидка на предмет и повышенная репутация
other.reputationtipdsc: Влияет на цены предметов и поведение выжившего по отношению к тебе. Зависит от общего состояния и взаимодействия с выжившим.
other.valuegiventipdsc:
Сколько должен выживший. Это валюта при обмене предметами.

Ты можешь получить в общей сложности только 60 единиц, прежде чем выживший начнет отказываться брать больше предметов
other.haggledsc: Попробовать договориться о снижении цены. Неправильный подход может расстроить торговца. В случае успеха это принесет очки к ИНТ.
other.haggledunedsc: Пусть Дюна откусит небольшой кусочек от одной из твоих конечностей в обмен на репутацию и валюту. Вероятно, он будет осторожен, чтобы избежать серьезного вреда.
other.hugdsc: Обнять выжившего. Ты можешь напугать его, если выживший не уверен в тебе.
other.threatendsc: Начать угрожать, чтобы получить одну или две бесплатные вещи. Это может иметь серьезные негативные последствия.
other.restdsc: Чтобы укрепить доверие и обеспечить себе более комфортный сон, поспите вместе с торговцем. Действуют обычные условия для сна.
other.tradermovedsc: Politely ask the trader to move aside, in case they're blocking something important.

other.startlorenote:
Год 2XXX 
<>
Человечество сильно прогрессировало в технологиях. 
<>
Одна компания начала исследовать биоинженерию, комбинируя человеческие и животные ДНК. 
<>
Это привело к созданию ими "Экспериментов", а также десятков последующих ответвлений. 
<>
После многих лет неэтичных частных экспериментов в лабораториях они нацелились на нечто большее. 
<>
Они знали о Серой планете с процветающей флорой и фауной и удобным путем. Вскоре были отправлены тысячи образцов, зданий и различных грузов. 
<>
Хотя большая часть груза была доставлена правильно, значительное количество груза по ошибке было отправлено в обширную сеть пещер планеты из-за ошибки калибровки. 
<>
Это включает в себя ошибочно отправленный важный экспериментальный образец техники, который теперь находится глубоко в подземных системах, и вернуть его обратно непросто. 
<>
Однако, ученые восприняли это как возможность провести дополнительные поведенческие исследования, отправив тысячи экземпляров на поиски утерянных технологий. 
<>
Шансы на успех невелики, но отправка недорогая, и ресурсов у них достаточно. 
<>
Ты — невезучий экземпляр.
Сопротивление бесполезно.

notes.Item1: это ужасно. здесь так много трупов... мне страшно. зачем они отправили так много нас? я не понимаю. я правда не понимаю. они вырубили меня каким-то дротиком и запихнули меня в капсулу, чтобы отправить сюда. я ненавижу эту планету.

Я расспросил других о способности видеть свое физическое состояние в своем сознании, и оказалось, что это есть почти у всех здесь. Довольно интересно — мы никогда не могли этого делать дома. Может, нам что-то имплантировали? На нас нет никаких видимых прикреплений. Я также заметил, что очень немногие здесь не разделяют этот опыт, по-видимому, им просто не хватает того, что позволяет нам это делать. Странно.
я продолжаю терять вес. мне нужно есть больше, чтобы оставаться в форме. эта беготня тратит очень много калорий. мне надо наедаться чаще.
это ужасно. это пиздец как ужасно. я так больше не могу. это миссия к верной смерти. нет никакой надежды. нет никакого смысла в этом.

я не понимаю, зачем мы здесь. для чего? я знаю, что мне нужно достать элемент питания или что-то типа того. я предполагаю, что у других такая же задача. разве нет более эффективных способов сделать это? логично? зачем посылать нас сюда. я скучаю по своим друзьям. я не хочу умирать.
я упал. плохо. моя нога изуродована. это ужасно плохо. любое движение причиняет боль. мне нужно немного обезбола.

я подслушал, как наши мучители называли нас мутировавшей смесью "человека, лисы и крысы", что бы это ни значило. как много от нас скрывают? в плане информации? эта мысль пугает меня. никогда не думал, что что-то может быть за пределами того, где мы выросли. и вот я здесь. в голове не укладывается все это.
(На бумаге изображено нечто похожее на автопортрет.)
Я выяснил, что рисование - это неплохой выход из ситуации, в которой я сейчас. Кажется, все мы так или иначе боремся со своим психическим состоянием. Иногда приятно отвлечься от суровой реальности.

планета хорошая .  кушаю много хорошей плоти .  дюна радуеться
(Ты можешь рязглядеть то, что обычно считается автопортретом, но он ужасно нарисован.)

Распределение видов здесь сильно неравномерное. Эксперименты повсюду, но другие виды, похожие на нас, кажется, гораздо менее многочисленны. Странно... В любом случае, мне не нравится количество жертв здесь. Многим из нас нужна помощь.

The distribution of species here seems very disproportional. The Experiments are everywhere, yet other species like ours seem to be much lesser in numbers. Odd... Either way, I dislike the amount of casualties here. More of us need to be helped.

I was performing a self check-up following a painful incident when I noticed a dark, nodular bump on my skin. It appeared irregular in shape and was oddly multicoloured and variegated. I estimated its diameter to be approximately eight millimetres. Upon further inspection, I found several more in various locations on my body. I corresponded with a younger friend and they seemed to have none, but my older friend had many more. Should I keep track of the evolution of this potential malignancy?

i didnt want to do it. they had a chest drain. what could i do? drown in my own blood? all i had was a stick of dynamite... if only i could be home, even just listening to the training radio, i would give anything. its not my fault. its not my fault.
i love this place! i still meet new creatures, they are so sweet! there are so many cool things here! i will never go back to the lab, long live the cave!
dune love tasting friend .  all friend taste different .  dark fur friend is stiff .  light fur friend is chewy .  what dune me taste like ?
hugging others makes me happier... but some of survivors refuse hugs, i think they can be appeased somehow. also sleeping next to them is much better than on the cold floor alone.

To anyone who finds this, they can and will control you, even in this hell. With no previous alert I started to hear a loud alarm inside me, I could see a message saying "DEPTH UNSATISFACTORY" with red flashing lights materializing in the corner of my vision.

I started running, panicked, without knowing why they would do this. Only after I went into another region of this cave network it stopped. They know how much time you are spending here, they know that you'll be frightened, and they want you to die. This is all a mass genocide.

i found a weapon. a firearm. gosh... im not used to operating this thing... i shouldve been more careful during the training sessions... i have zero idea of how ive even been sent here, being this unprepared, instead of getting culled. i almost shot someone by accident. i shouldve turned on the gun safety... who am i to know. the others tend to really panic when they see you holding a weapon in hand. so maybe it would be best to put it inside of something, so that they dont see it. they think youd shoot them, they dont know your intentions. well, id think the same if someone were to point a gun at me.

im so mad at myself for acting like a dumbass with the others up there... now all of the survivors i find chase me away from their pods... man, if you knew how hard they were swearing... they tried to scratch me... and im just saying to myself: "okay, im sorry. for fucks sake, do you realize that currently every life matters? theres no room for hurting and killing each other.". i wish i was a better person... its my own fault.

dont always trust the barrels of liquid lying around. got my hands on a big minibarrel of what i thought was lemondade, but one bitter sip was enough to tell me that it wasnt. i tried to wash it down with another barrel of water, but the water made me very cold and my hair started falling out

today i found a few weird metal cans that had the label ripped off. i couldnt tell what it was and the liquid was too thick to pour out, but it is surprisingly filling, i feel like i just had a nice steak... i feel so sleepy. im about to drink the next can, i love these cans!
(The bottom of the paper looks like something with black chunks in it was forcibly ejected onto it.)

this might be a strange thing to say but I've made my peace with this situation. ive been trying to take care of myself as much as i can and trying to comfort all the others ive met down here. it makes me feel... content? even though I've gotten hurt a lot ive been able to handle it without feeling down.
i'll try to get as far as i can, and even though i probably wont make it, i know i did my best and helped as many others as i could. that's all any of us can do.
if you're reading this, don't give up, ok?

i have been seeing more and more of these broken down drop pods recently, kind of like the ones that they sent us down here with except these ones all exploded somehow <>
inside the wreckages i usually find some type of gun ammunition along with a gross ball of some sort of meat? 
<>
it looks awful but it might be edible???
that dune person i met earlier told me it was good to eat
i could try having some of it
<>

ate it and vomited my guts out for twenty minutes straight, worst mistake of my life <>
for the love of god, dont eat whatever that is

i keep having the same dream. i have huge wings and i can keep flying up and up and up. nothing can stop me. i burst through the ceilings of these caverns and out into the world beyond. it's beautiful out there but i keep flying. i leave everything behind until there's nothing but a huge void. that's when i finally realize. im safe. im free.

every time i wake up, i cant stop crying. i wish i could keep dreaming forever.

(There is a tear-stained drawing of some very inaccurate wings.)

can the scientists really see me here? they always wanted me to say out loud what i was thinking, but here, im just talking to myself. i suppose i have the freedom to stop, but... it feels therapeutic. if i dont make it, maybe at least these notes will.

i didnt realize how bad it had gotten until i tried to dig again and my claws just... scraped. no bite to them anymore. ive been clawing through rock nonstop without even thinking about it. i felt naked. turns out flesh isnt meant to replace tools.
<>
i kept assuming i needed a pickaxe for everything. but i figured out my machete works just fine for the lighter stuff. dirt, plants, sand, it slices right through. saves my hands a lot of pain.
<>
found a bottle labeled keratin booster. figures they planned for our parts to break down. took a sip. after a while the old layers started flaking off like fur. underneath, they felt sharper. stronger. it was weirdly satisfying watching the worn parts peel away. i like how my claws let me grip the walls better
<>
i remembered the humans. they had nails on every finger. all of them. no claws at all. it looked so wrong up close. soft. blunt. freaky how they managed anything with hands like that.
<>
i used to think that made them weak.
<>
now i wonder if that was the point.

It's full of all kinds of critters that constantly roam around everywhere. I'm a bit of a pacifist, so I try running away from them, rather than fighting them, as I don't know who's gonna kill whom first... After all, the wounds they leave in me hurt like hell... I don't know anymore... Do our captors even know what we're going through down here?

I took a bad fall. REAL bad. Right into a hole and couldn't climb or dig out of with my injuries. But I made it out with these bits of scrap metal, and want to let others know this, too. 

Its the cavern walls! Nothing I've found- even dynamite -seems to be able to penetrate the outer boundaries of the caverns. But they are uneven, and if you stack enough bits of scrap metal on top of each other, you can wedge them in these tiny gaps and make an entire scrap foothold. When I was bleeding out in that dark hole, I used my collected debris to make a sort of staircase to escape and find emergency supplies.

I hope you never wind up in that situation, though. Maybe you could use this trick to protect you from injury in the first place? Who knows what other nasty things are in here with us. 

Maybe you'll catch up to me and we can share strategies. 
I hope I'll be there to meet you.

I'm feeling lonely... so I decided to distract myself:
I found some kind of miniature fax that I was able to crush open, and I pulled its paper sheets out. Then I took a stick, and squeezed one of the glowy fruits onto it. It turned out like a brush and drawing canvas! If only you know... I started drawing alternate realities where we're free and live peacefully together; without those scientist scumbags... I felt so happy, and cried for a bit.
But now I have to go: feeling peckish! Maybe if we meet each other, I'll draw you, too...? I got really good at using the "brush". I'll try teaching the others to draw, too...

I'm not very strong, so I've been hoping to team up with others. We'd have a much higher chance of survival that way, but nobody I've asked is interested. Everyone is scared and some of us are dangerous. There are so many traps that it's impossible to travel in large groups. I know I'm going to die for a completely stupid reason...

Humans are so cruel. I can't understand it.

(The note is crumpled up and crushed, as if it was meant to be thrown away.)
<>
my friend they... i think they killed themselves. after another bad fall i tried fixing up their legs but they kept telling me to fuck off. they kept shooing me away like some sort of fly, telling me to leave them alone. i didnt get it. i left to grab some of the plants here to try and bandage them up but... when i came back they had another wound. one on their arm. i still remember what it looked like, it was bad, practically ripped apart. i tried to use the plants i found to fix up the new wound but they kept pushing me away. their eyes were... looked just... empty. i told them to fucking stop and just let me help but they didnt respond. i tried to help a couple more times and theyd shove me away until they just... stopped. i remember seeing their body relax, i think thats when they stopped breathing. i cant get that image out of my head...
<>
did... did i do something wrong? i swear i didnt... what did i do wrong? why did they do that? i... i didnt do anything. i dont understand, i dont want to die... i dont... i...
<>
...
<>
haha...
<>
its so lonely in here.
<>
(You notice faint, dried tear drops and dried blood riddled among the wrinkled up note.)

(There are colorful graphics on the paper, and it doesn't appear to be handwritten)
<>
Soup! Try our Specialty Pot - just put the meat and ingredients in and simmer. Don't worry. You'll agree it's worth its weight in flavor. Can be stored for up to 737 years!
ух, херня, а не место. меня постоянно кусают всякие пауки, которых я не успеваю заметить. я думаю, они ядовитые, так как оставляют на мне отвратительные раны... хотя плоды светокуста помогают с этим
красные мигающие огоньки в темноте - это ловушки с шипами. берегись их. прошу. пожалуйста. кто-то только что наткнулся на одну из них вдалеке, я услышал вскрик и вскоре тишину. береги себя
здесь холодно. очень холодно. гораздо холоднее, чем в нашем прошлом доме. честно, мне здесь нравится. купаться в бассейне приятно, это освежает. мне нравится такой отпуск

я встретился кое с кем, и мы договорились попробовать выбраться на поверхность через одно из тех отверстий наружу. мой друг вышел первым, и он сразу же начал спотыкаться от шока. ему наверное было очень больно. его сильно вырвало, затем он упал в обморок и вскоре перестал дышать. на его коже также появились волдыри, особенно вокруг головы и шеи. что-то мешает нам выйти. мне очень страшно.

Промокать здесь довольно опасно, если быть неосторожным. Температура здесь намного ниже, чем у нас дома, и, похоже, слишком долгое пребывание мокрым может привести к гипотермии. Можно попробовать заняться какой-нибудь физической нагрузкой, если нужно быстро разогреться, я выяснил, что это помогает.

мне правда нужно перестать терять мои источники света. подойдет все что угодно, даже эти странные светящиеся растения. я все время прохожу мимо и забываю о них, а потом спотыкаюсь и случайно получаю травму. нехорошо.

Getting wet seems to be rather dangerous if you're not careful. The temperature here is much lower than at our home, and it seems being drenched for too long can get us in a hypothermic state. Try doing some physical exercise if you need to warm up quickly, I've discovered that helps.
i really need to stop losing my lights. anything does the job, even those weird glowy plant things. i keep leaving and forgetting about them, then tripping up and getting hurt by accident. not good.

light is valuable resource here, especially as it gets darker the further we go. dont want to accidentally step on a trap. with the carcass of a spider and pieces of glowplant, i can fashion a headlamp so my hands remain free. in a pinch lightbulbs in the pods seem to run on a depleted battery, and can be broken off with relative ease, much to the aggression of the pods owner

theres a lot of pods out here just like the one i woke up in. i got in one through the window but i stepped on the broken glass. had to be really careful, but i pulled it out of my paw. need to make sure i clear the shards next time.

Humans do strange things. You should never trust them to be nice.
But you can trust them to keep you alive.<>
I broke my arm once, and they put it in a “cast.” I did not like it. It was heavy and stopped my arm from moving at all. It seemed they made it worse on purpose, and they made me wear it for a long time.<>
They removed it one day, and my arm was fine.<>
The humans made it worse, so it could get better.<>

I think they did something similar to Jumper's head.
Jumper used to scream and cry a lot. One time they hurt themselves, and the humans took them away.<>
Jumper is back now. They don't cry anymore. They don't talk. They look sleepy all the time. Their head is like my arm used to be. I can't see any “casts” around it, and their behavior worries me, but at least they don't hurt themselves anymore. I hope the humans undo whatever they did once Jumper's head is fixed.<>

I miss them.

эти коробки со странными компьютерами рядом с ними явно можно открыть, если пролить на них немного красной крови. это должна быть именно красная кровь, иначе не сработает. внутри есть несколько ящиков, их можно открыть и взять с собой все что нужно. полезно.

Изучая химический состав пакетов с кровью разных цветов, которые я нашел здесь, я выяснил, что они сильно отличаются по своему составу. Красная кровь полностью отличается от нашей и от крови, которой обладают здешние существа. У нее, по какой-то причине, есть что-то металлическое в составе. Лучше не стоит использовать это на себе.
(Тут есть плохо сделанный рисунок человека, похожего на одного из ваших мучителей. Ты распознал электрошокер в его руке. Его лицо закрыто большим крестом. Оружие навевает ужасные воспоминания.)

я чуть не утонул буквально только что. я никогда раньше не плавал, и это очень утомительно. мне сложно оставаться на поверхности, когда я устаю. представляю, что утонуть навсегда — довольно больно... будь осторожен.

судя по тому, что мы подслушали у мучителей, видимо, что груз, который нам нужно получить, это какой-то "продвинутый источник энергии". что-то вроде хранения большого количества энергии и передачи ее "без проводов". я не знаю, что это вообще значит, но, думаю, что это будет полезно знать. береги себя

Недавно я нашел что-то вроде бура, но в нем не хватает нескольких деталей. Я точно не могу понять, какие именно детали, не считая закрывающей панели для всех механизмов... Может оказаться полезным, если я смогу привести его в порядок.

Curious, I attempted to traverse in a prone position.
<>
The utility was unexpected. Not only does it allow one to rinse off contaminants in shallow puddles and squeeze through narrow gaps, but remarkably, even crawling over scattered glass shards resulted in no injury.
<>
However, complacency is dangerous. I misjudged a slight drop and injured myself. 
<>
Scuttling around like that... I must have looked just like one of those "worms" I heard about.
glowing woter taste bed

It hurts me to admit, but the frailty of my kind cannot be denied. Luckily, I have found a wonderful container that outright nullifies the weight of most items, allowing me to carry more supplies than I'd normally be able to.
It runs on batteries, and that worries me. I am not sure what will happen once the power runs out, so I'll check it now, to be safe.<>
I don't want it to become heavy mid-jump. I have an almost dead battery on me.
Time to see how the bag behaves once its power runs out.

(The rest of the note is unreadable; whatever text was written below is covered up by a copious amount of dried blood.)

Not even out of this rocky hellscape, and I already feel like death is near,
All they gave me was a shitty torch that didnt even last an hour; not even any safety gear to help cushon these falls i've been taking.

FUCK ME, I feel like a ball from one of those gambling machines I would see those humans using!

I think I might be slowly dying, ever since the last fall, I've been feeling pretty heavy headed, I feel tired; but I feel if i sleep, I will die.

God save me.
FUCK, man.
I really don't want to die, not like this..
Though what even is the point of all this?
I don't even have a name for myself, just a tag..
Fuck...
ух. здесь так жарко. нужно очень внимательно следить за своими движениями и не окоченеть из-за жары. я узнал, что купание в бассейнах помогает... и возможно, даже в коричневых, если совсем отчаянный.

i want to put everything to an end
everything is misery

thank you for everything. goodbye
The vines spread around the area are surprisingly climbable. The thin ones less so, but you can use the large ones as natural ladders. Definitely saved me a few fractured legs.

Today I happened upon a door for which unlocking was contingent upon the insertion of some scrap. I did not possess any on my person; however, I was fortunately equipped with a laser-action drill, which made quick work of the surrounding walls. Inside, I obtained an electronic device on which some exquisite music had been stored. I listen to it from time to time.

The oil pools on this planet are definitely unnatural. Trying to understand their origin, I crawled through one of the empty pipes only to find a tough metallic screen that stopped me from progressing.
There was a sign behind it that said "Waste Disposal Source". I drilled through the pipe to go around the screen, but the pipe stopped abruptly. It has to be connected to something from our old home, but I don't understand how.

That sign keeps worrying me. Did the humans want to dispose of us too?
see evil creature... orange evil creature... creature want eat dune!   but dune fight back.   dune kill and eat evil creature!   creature very tasty!
tons of bushes around this place, though i cant say ive seen any that are alive. i think theyre pretty useful for making ropes and cushioning falls, but they also tend to hide traps...

i hear ringing.. my head hurts so, so much, i heard a loud beeping sound as i descended down a bit and then there was that loud banging sound     i dont know where it came from . i can't see that much further but there is something very dangerous in these caves, be careful with big open spaces

Похоже, здесь высокий уровень токсичных отходов в данной зоне. Хотя это и затрудняет навигацию, нужно помнить, что мы можем получать кратковременные дозы ионизирующего излучения без особых проблем, если облучение не длится слишком долго. Something is wrong with the environment here. In the air, I can feel it- those dilapidated fuel cells make my fur stand on end. My skin flakes when I pass them, and my body burns. Even when I can't see them, I can feel that uneasy sensation building in the air around them. I've had to use my rope spool and even claw through the rocks here to find routes around them, but even then, there are purple stones that seem to carry the same effect, just in different doses.

one of the others I found fell onto a bunch of those purple rocks. i managed to pull them away but both of our coats are shedding. i don't know what's happening.<>




i ate one of the popping fruits by a life pod… things stopped hurting. but when they bit into one they started throwing up blood just minutes later. they're not breathing. what was different? they looked the same. am i just lucky to be alive? why didn't they get better.

The button next to the trigger on a pistol is the magazine release, whereas on a shotgun, it's typically the safety. Also, whenever you work the action (like pulling the bolt), it ejects the round in the chamber. Last time I did that, I lost a buckshot - pretty unfortunate.

drinkable water here is really scarce, and i dont think that tar-looking stuff is safe. some of the vegetation here has enough water content to be crushed into a juice, although the taste isnt very pleasant. it beats being thirsty though

i steped in another one of theose damned coils again today, it was hidden in a bush, I noticed it too late to pull back.

it was horrible, like i was being cooked from the inside, even after the initial shock. cold drinks seem to help though, i had to drink most of my rationed milk, and some apple juice, not sure if my brain would have survived without it. evrything is still spinning, could barely even make it back to my pod.

I do not have any water left in my bottle in this desert. I was very dirty and thirsty. I stepped in a puddle I found to drink it and take a bath, then all the dirt made it cloudy. I couldnt drink it anymore. I should have tossed my bottle in. I need water...

i... i felt myself dying. it was all so sudden, there was blood everywhere and i couldnt keep my eyes open. i was scared... but i didnt want to give up. i found so many cool things in this place and i feel like ive made so much progress in this mission. im not gonna stop here. i will make it through all of this shit. i will see my friends again.

i didnt think that monster would find me again, but it did. it knew my face, my mistakes... but not my rifle. when it finally burst open, i saw that pickaxe. i saw the etching i scratched into it, the same as the etching they scratched into my pickaxe. i saw the chip from when they tried to dig up some titanium to gift me. and then, suddenly, i saw it happening again. the smell of grating steel. the tremours of the ground. the sound of dismembering flesh. the taste of sweat and blood, as i tried to run, dropping the food i was bringing back to the pod-
<>
am i supposed to feel at ease now? or am i just bargaining for peace, to be broken when another finds me?

I want to leave this place, I am terrorized, I don't have words to describe what I just experienced, it was a big, horrid creature with hundreds of teeth, ready to devour me, it chase after me for what I've felt hours, it destroys everything on its path. It stopped only after I've went so far away that I was completely lost, it drained my food, water, tools, even my own sanity, I just want this to end.

здесь слишком холодно. я очень стараюсь не намокать, иначе это будет большой проблемой. повезло, что здесь много странных споровых растений, которые излучают немного тепла, как и те странные машины. стоит пробегать между ними, я думаю. лучше не стоит долго оставаться на морозе.
dune cold. dig warm not warm enough. dune eat fur friend. eat raw! dune has fur. fur warm for dune. dune full and warm. dune happy not cold.

its cold down here, i keep having to duck into lifepods to warm up… although sometimes theres these little humming stoves that i can stop by for warmth, i just need to be careful not to touch them for too long, they make me feel sick. just enough to warm up and then keep going. if i were you id play it safe and look out for anything digging towards me when im resting. i can hear stuff tunneling around me.

Странно, что тут идут дожди. Я никогда раньше не видел настоящий дождь... Это довольно красиво, даже если негигиенично. Я все еще удивляюсь, как здесь может быть так много воды. Возможно, вода с ледяной вершины стекает сюда?

[BIOMETRIC REPORT - 25##-11-19-18-49-58-4587]
<>
ENTITY CLASS: Biological
ENTITY SUBCLASS: Sawian
ENTITY NAME: Experiment
<>
[CONTENTS]

The stable biological version of our newest project is ready.
It appears that, mentally, there wasn't and will be nothing left of our original human volunteer, not to mention the rest of the subjects.
Despite that, they seem to be learning fast, and are not retaliating.
<>
The DNA combination caused the Experiment to be considerably smaller in stature than a human person, and lack fat and muscle mass.
Despite this, it's muscle and bone density is much higher. This will assumbly result in the specimen being resilient to various forms of physical trauma... And give it a hard time swimming.
It has three protrusions at the back of its skull, of form similar to ear cartilage. Somehow, it has an ear structure similar to that of an avian - must've been lying around somewhere in the DNA we spliced.
It is thinly furred, and has pink-ish yellow-ish flesh, as seen on wounds and on the inside of the mouth.
Its hands are some kind of combination between a canine's and a homosapiens'. I know one of my co-workers is going to enjoy the paws-
Somehow, the bioluminescent eyes from our earlier prototypes of this species have stayed. We are yet to determine the exact effects this has on their sight.
<>
We will soon clone this specimen 30 times to conduct destructive testing on the clones. We will leave a few to naturally reproduce, to save on resources.

[END]

<>
[CONTENTS]

Reduction of Corporate Waste Objective
<>
32 Sawians were recruited randomly among those at our site fro<corrupt:0xFFFFFF> Baseline characteristics were: 25 SAW-01, 4 SAW-03, 3 SAW-12. The subjects were randomly assigned to 8 groups of 4 subjects each. Each group were subject to one choice in three types of conditions: consuming Sawian or Terran meat, consuming raw or as soup, and observing or being ignorant of the source of the meat.

Meat was sourced from the Indicent on [25##-12-30].
<>
While the SAW-01 and SAW-03 in all groups which consumed the Sawian meat, regardless of whether they observed the source of the meat, displayed extreme negative emotion upon consumption, the SAW-12 did not display the same negative emotions. No Sawians which consumed the terran meat displayed negative emotions, presumably as they did not recognize the meat as their own, although complaints were raised about eating noncooked food. No Sawians which consumed the meat in soup form displayed negative emotions, even if they had observed the source.

The SAW-12 displayed an aberrant apathy towards consuming raw Sawian meat, as expected. We might be able to repurpose discarded specimens as food for any SAW-12s on site.

[END]

REF: [INTERNAL MEMORANDUM - 25##-12-07-09-12-40-0157]

ENTITY CLASS: Biological
ENTITY SUBCLASS: Sawian
<>
[CONTENTS]

This memorandum establishes mandatory terminology policy regarding the Sawian species and supersedes all prior documentation, annotations, and informal usage.

Effective immediately, the term "hermaphrodite" is **banned in all corporate communications**, including scientific, operational, cultural, and casual contexts. The sole exception is explicit historical reference (e.g., quotations, legacy documentation analysis, or discussion of obsolete Earth taxonomies), which must be clearly labeled as such.

The approved descriptor for Sawian reproductive biology is "gonosimulistic."  
Context-dependent alternatives include "cosexual" and "monoecious."

Use of the term outside of these narrow historical contexts is considered inappropriate, reductive, and professionally suspect. This introduces avoidable interpretive risk and will be reviewed under the Stakeholder-Facing Language Control Framework.
<>
No human naturally possesses two fully functional reproductive systems. The appropriate human medical and social term is "intersex", not "hermaphrodite". The latter term originated from the mythological figure Hermaphroditus and has long been associated with stigma, violence, and dehumanization. This includes the use of this term to refer to animals, thus equating intersex humans with animals. This has thus proven volatile in public, academic, and media-facing environments.
<>
The application of this term to non-human species arose from that same framework and is therefore neither neutral nor acceptable, regardless of biological differences.
<>
While historical alternatives exist, such as "eunuch", "bisexual", and "androgyny", these have taken on new meanings and connotations and are not appropriate to use in this way either.

Do not project human gender or sex frameworks onto Sawian subjects. Reproductive biology does not imply gender identity, presentation, orientation, or social function.

Reproductive terminology is not casual vocabulary and should not be treated as such.
<>
This policy does not constitute a moral position, medical guidance, or cultural endorsement. Its purpose is strictly to ensure consistency, reduce ambiguity, and protect the organization from reputational exposure.

[ATTACHMENTS END]

[END]

So.

I find this device quite fascinating, and it is a shame that I will part with it in just a few hours. But I have been given a task, and I shall complete it.<>

We usually are woken up either by eachother, or by the first food buzzer ringing. Rarely do we wake up to testing immediately.
I'm not sure what "hour" this happens at... Hell, I barely understand the concept. Though, I hear the coats talking about it all the time...

Anyway, we wake up and soon it's time for our very first meal of the day.
What they feed us is slightly varied, which wasn't the case just a few years ago. Still mostly just nutrient bars, though. They're really bland, but I can't complain...

--------------------------------------------------<>
It's some hours later now.

This is the time when the coats hunt.
They call you out by the number, and you have to come to them.
Or they come for you. 
You do not want that.
Sometimes, they call out multiple numbers... It's usually a good sign, though.<>

What they'll do to you is up to chance, really.
The tests can be harmless, they can be terrible, or they can be beneficial.
It's worth noting that the coats merely TRY to do things, and while sometimes they try to help, those attempts are usually far less successful than the ones where they try to mess you up.<>

Two numbers are called, and two others stand up, their faces worried.
One of them is healthy. Far more likely to get hurt.

The other has four arms.
One on the left, and three on the right.
Well, if you could call the weird growths arms. They look kinda close?
They were originally born with two. The coats decided that to be too much one day, and removed one.
The next day, they came back with ELEVEN arms.
The humans removed ten of those, only to grace them with seven new ones.
The next day it was five.
Today it's four.

They are getting close now.<>

The poor fellow is called Arms. And I swear, this was their name BEFORE this whole ordeal, and it's widely believed that humans picked them because of that.
Perhaps it's their idea of a joke?

Best-case scenario, they walk in on their own. Quite common, actually.

Rarely, two guards come in instead. They head straight to someone's cot and take away their things.
If it were your friend, and the guards are some of the nicer ones, they will let you keep a thing or two.
I don't really have anyone to wait for anymore, so I just watch those who do. Everyone is used to this, but the nerves are always present.
<>

Dinner time.
The meal dispensers dropped some cooked meat on my plate. Lucky. Better than breakfast, for sure.

People talk. They play. They sing.
Some nurse their wounds, or help others nurse theirs.
It's a calm time.
The coats are done for the time being.

Later.
In about an "hour", our last meal of the day will be served.
Bedtime soon after that.
There is not much more to say, really.
